name: Squatex Energy and Resources Inc.
summary: Squatex Energy and Resources Inc. engages in the exploration and development of oil and gas properties in the territory of Quebec. It owns 36 licenses covering an area of 6,560.93 km2 in the Appalachian Basin, including 12 exploration permits, which cover 2,249.33 km2 in the St. Lawrence Lowlands region; and 24 exploration permits that covers 4,311.60 km2 in the Lower St. Lawrence/Gaspe region. Squatex Energy and Resources Inc. was founded in 2001 and is based in Brossard, Canada.
